query: browser admin login flow dashboard cookie auth

results.title: Backend login and auth UI cleanup
results.content: Integrated real backend login into the Next.js auth flow, added a dedicated /auth/logout route handler for safe cookie clearing on stale/401 sessions, removed the mock-style sign-up screen, and simplified the sign-in UI to a single professional login card aligned to the frontend integration contract and screen API map. Also tightened auth/session and contract typing using live Swagger and payload checks from localhost:3001.

results.title: FindTourGo NextAuth migration assessment
results.content: Assessed FindTourGo auth for migration to Auth.js/NextAuth. Current frontend is heavily coupled to client-side JWT cookies and browser-side Bearer attachment: AuthService reads/writes access/refresh/deviceSession cookies, ApiClient attaches Authorization from browser state, AuthProvider runs proactive refresh timer, and many React Query hooks gate on useSession(). NextAuth migration is feasible, but a full cutover is high-risk unless API calls move server-side or backend tokens are intentionally exposed through the Auth.js session. Recommended approach is phased/hybrid: 1) add Auth.js with Credentials provider against existing backend login/refresh endpoints, 2) use it first for middleware/server guards and session normalization, 3) bridge existing useSession consumers, 4) gradually move sensitive API calls behind Next.js route handlers/server actions, 5) only then retire custom cookie/timer/interceptor logic. Main architectural caveat: Auth.js docs recommend attaching backend bearer

results.title: Auth & Client Tracking with --secure mode in coder/coder-node
results.content: ection, URL sanitisation), cmd/coder/cmd_login.go (registration flow with bootstrap token prompt + git identity detection), cmd/coder/config.go (Auth.AccessToken field in Config, passed to httpclient.NewClient and httpclient.NewSkillClient), cmd/coder-node/main.go (SECURE_MODE=true env var, bootstrap token printed once on first startup, httpmiddleware.Auth wraps the HTTP mux). HTTP clients updated: NewClient(baseURL, accessToken) and NewSkillClient(baseURL, accessToken) — addAuth() helper injects Bearer header on every request. logActivity() called at start of runMemoryStore, runMemorySearch, runSkillSearch, runSkillIngest.

results.title: OMS API implemented JWT login refresh and session/login history
results.content: Added full auth flow in users module: POST /v1/users/login and POST /v1/users/refresh-token with JWT access+refresh tokens via @nestjs/jwt. Introduced LoginUseCase and RefreshTokenUseCase, DTOs (login, refresh-token, auth-tokens-response), password hash verification utility, and auth token utilities (secret/ttl/session id/hash). Extended UserRepository with findAuthByEmail, session persistence, session rotation, and login history methods. Added TypeORM entities user_sessions and user_login_history, wired them in UsersModule, and implemented repository methods in TypeormUserRepository. Added migration 1771000007000-CreateUserSessionsAndLoginHistory.ts. Added route limits for login (5/min) and refresh-token (10/min). Validation passed: yarn lint, yarn build, yarn test (11 suites).

results.title: OMS API added throttling for register and password-reset endpoints
results.content: Installed @nestjs/throttler and configured global ThrottlerModule + APP_GUARD(ThrottlerGuard) in src/app.module.ts with baseline 120 req/min. Added endpoint-specific limits in src/modules/users/presentation/users.controller.ts: POST /v1/users/register = 5/min, POST /v1/users/password-reset/request = 3/min, POST /v1/users/password-reset/confirm = 5/min. There is currently no login endpoint in src, so no login-specific decorator was applied. Validation passed with yarn lint, yarn build, yarn test.
